summary: Removed CLI-only dead code (~102 files including builder/, dead output/ components, cli.py, profile_abundance.py, test_cli_execution.py). Simplified model_checker/__init__.py and output/__init__.py. Added bimodal-logic check CLI backed by Z3OracleProvider with 18 TDD tests. Oracle pipeline intact, 624-627 bimodal tests passing (2 pre-existing flaky BM_CM_1 failures).
